protocol.scope: fresh-seed read-only Stage 0 after M1k stopped; no optimizer, trainable model, parameter mutation, checkpoint selection, reuse of M1k blind seed427151, formal validation, or test access
protocol.scientific_question: before training another caller, does a capacity-stable fixed structural identity key retrieve the correct earlier archival context when the current event is explicitly excluded, and does causal confidence separate safe reads from unsafe reads
protocol.parent_scientific_result: M1k failed four of five scientific gates independently of the numerical implementation gate; M1k is stopped and seed427151 is sealed
protocol.research_reset: M1l changes identity retrieval itself: fixed event anchors, no learned Q/K, current-event exclusion, explicit confidence feasibility, and cross-capacity read-only gating before any training
protocol.source_conversion: parameter-free M1f with covariance-corrected content HPC ridge 0.001

retrieval.event_detector: rising edge of the causal balanced-action structural proposal: proposal[t] and not proposal[t-1]
retrieval.query_anchor: the cyclic action signature captured at the latest detected event and carried causally to the current token
retrieval.candidate_events: all detected event anchors strictly earlier than the latest/current anchor
retrieval.current_event_exclusion: the latest anchor and its base-context value are never candidates for its own segment
retrieval.key: fixed normalized cyclic action signature; no learned query/key projection
retrieval.value: frozen M1f base_context activation at the candidate event
retrieval.attention: softmax cosine attention over candidate events
retrieval.confidence_score: top1 attention probability multiplied by one minus normalized attention entropy
retrieval.shuffled_control: deterministic one-step rotation of candidate archival values within the same causal candidate set; keys, weights, count, timing, and episode remain unchanged

allowed: frozen structural proposals computed from actions
earlier frozen base-context activations from the same episode
forbidden_model_inputs: query, return, conflict, correctness, or oracle masks
causal_input_contract.diagnostic_metadata_rule: room, segment, target, return, and reference metadata may be read only after retrieval to score identity, controls, and query-only interventions

query_only_intervention.normal_trajectory: run frozen M1f normally for every earlier read and write
query_only_intervention.candidate: replace context only at the currently scored return-conflict query with the anchored retrieval candidate
query_only_intervention.shuffled: replace only that query with the same-weight rotated-value control
query_only_intervention.isolation: at most one query per episode is changed in any rollout

protocol.post_result_rule: classify once across all three capacity levels; do not tune temperature, event definition, confidence score, thresholds, or current-event exclusion on seed527151; Stage 1 requires every implementation and scientific gate to pass
